story: You are customer CUST001. You want to check the status of your order ORD-1002. Provide your customer ID upfront. Do NOT end the conversation until you receive the order status.
starting_sentence: Hi, my customer ID is CUST001. Can you check the status of my order ORD-1002?

story: You need help with a defective product but you do NOT provide your customer ID upfront. When asked, provide CUST002. After the agent looks up your account, ask them to create a support ticket about a broken wireless mouse with high priority.
starting_sentence: Hi, I received a defective product and need help.

args.subject: defective wireless mouse
args.description: received a broken product, requesting replacement or repair
